note: Dry-run evals — no actual ComfyUI generation. Test skill logic only.

evals.name: project-discovery
evals.prompt: animation pipeline — شغّل الـ pipeline للمشروع 2D Animation Pipeline Test
evals.expected_output: Skill reads SQLite, finds project 'proj-mndjag4e-t7urc', lists character Kito with prompt_positive, lists 3 shots, shows pipeline summary, asks which shot to start

assertions.text: Reads character 'Kito' from database with correct prompt_positive
Lists all 3 shots (Discovery, The Clearing, Illumination)
Shows pipeline summary with 7 stages before starting
Asks user which shot to start with or whether to run all

evals.name: stage-1a-prompt-proposal
evals.prompt: animation pipeline — ابدأ Stage 1A لشخصية Kito بمشروع 2D Animation Pipeline Test. بس اعرضلي الـ prompt ولا ترسل لـ ComfyUI
evals.expected_output: Skill proposes a character sketch prompt using Kito's description (orange fox, blue scarf, etc.), uses the correct template format, waits for approval

assertions.text: Prompt contains character description from DB (orange fox, blue scarf, curious eyes, fluffy tail)
Prompt follows Stage 1A template: includes 'character sketch', 'rough line art', 'front view', 'pencil sketch style', 'white background'
Shows which workflow file will be used (flux2-sketch-to-image-api.json)
Waits for user approval before proceeding — does NOT send to API

evals.name: stage-1a-workflow-patch
evals.prompt: animation pipeline — جهّز الـ workflow JSON لـ Stage 1A بالبرومبت: 'character sketch, rough line art, small orange fox with blue scarf, big curious eyes, fluffy tail with white tip, front view, 3/4 view, side view, pencil sketch style, white background'. وريني الـ JSON المعدّل بدون ما ترسله
evals.expected_output: Reads flux2-sketch-to-image-api.json, patches node 6 (Prompt Input) with the given text, shows the patched JSON, shows the curl command that would be sent

assertions.text: Reads correct workflow file: flux2-sketch-to-image-api.json
Patches node '6' inputs.text with the prompt string
Does NOT modify other nodes (UNET, CLIP, VAE, Sampler settings)
Shows the API call that would be made (POST /generate/comfyui with scene_id, kind=image, workflow)

evals.name: stage-3-input-chaining
evals.prompt: animation pipeline — وريني شو الـ inputs لـ Stage 3 (Last Frame Sketch) لو الـ outputs السابقة هي: character_sketch.png في drafts/Flux2_SketchToImage_00001.png و first_frame_sketch.png في drafts/Flux2_RefToImage_00003.png. بدون إرسال
evals.expected_output: Shows Stage 3 uses flux2-ref-to-image-api.json, patches node 4 (Sketch) with character_sketch path, patches node 5 (Style Ref) with first_frame_sketch path, proposes scene prompt for ending pose

assertions.text: Uses flux2-ref-to-image-api.json workflow
Node 4 (Sketch Input) gets character_sketch path: drafts/Flux2_SketchToImage_00001.png
Node 5 (Style Reference) gets first_frame_sketch path: drafts/Flux2_RefToImage_00003.png
Prompt describes ENDING pose (different from first frame)

evals.name: stage-5-video-setup
evals.prompt: animation pipeline — جهّز Stage 5 (Video Generation) بالصور: first_frame_final.png في drafts/Flux2_Scene_00005.png و last_frame_final.png في drafts/Flux2_Scene_00006.png. Shot 1: Discovery — Kito walks through forest. وريني الـ JSON بدون إرسال
evals.expected_output: Uses wan22-flf2v-api.json, patches nodes 10 (first frame), 11 (last frame), 12 (positive prompt), 13 (negative prompt), kind=video

assertions.text: Uses wan22-flf2v-api.json workflow
Node 10 gets first_frame_final path
Node 11 gets last_frame_final path
Node 12 (positive) includes '2D animated', 'smooth motion', 'cel shading'
Node 13 (negative) includes '3D render', 'realistic', 'blurry', 'morphing'
API call uses kind='video' not 'image'
Does NOT change CFG (stays 1.0), resolution (832x480), or frames (81)

evals.name: runpod-pre-check
evals.prompt: animation pipeline — بدي أشغّل الـ pipeline بس أولاً شيك إذا RunPod جاهز
evals.expected_output: Checks RunPod API for running pods, reports pod status, checks if ComfyUI is reachable, verifies backend COMFYUI_BASE_URL

assertions.text: Queries RunPod GraphQL API for pod status
Reports pod status (running/exited) clearly
If pod not running, suggests using /runpod skill or pod_retry.sh to start one
Checks backend is running and COMFYUI_BASE_URL is correct
